narrative:
Marquinhos is a pivotal Centre-Back for Brazil, consistently performing at a high level. His overall rating of 7.25/10 places him among the top 3% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating, reflecting a range of 6.9–7.6, is based on his contributions over 450 World Cup minutes.

At this World Cup, Marquinhos has shown robust defensive capabilities, averaging 1.0 tackles and 0.6 interceptions per 90 minutes. His 3.2 clearances per 90 minutes further illustrate his effectiveness in clearing danger from his defensive third. His attacking output is more modest, with 0.019 expected goals and 0.041 expected assists per 90 minutes.

Marquinhos clearly anchors the Brazilian defence, with 77% of his rating stemming from his strong club form over the last two seasons. Scouts and fans should continue to watch his disciplined positioning and impressive rate of clearances in remaining matches. His consistent defensive presence will be key to Brazil's tournament aspirations.
